subcodes.first_line: Thy call hath been heard, and thy turning toward the Most Holy Court is known and manifest before God. We have accepted thy deed in [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ندایت اصغا شد و توجهت بشطر اقدس لدی الله معلوم و واضحست انا قبلنا عملک فی
subcodes.subjects: @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
